one_line: I2S plants 'cmap'/'GSUN' FOURCCs and sfnt magic enabling first-glyph lookup

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace copies intercepted sfnt version magic and 'cmap' table-tag CMP operands directly into the input at parser offsets, constructing a parseable font that exposes a virama glyph; value_profile's coarse Hamming feedback can approach but not land these exact equality tokens.
one_line: I2S plants sfnt version and cmap FOURCC so virama glyph lookup succeeds

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace records the concrete integer and FOURCC equality comparison operands in the font parser (magic-number and table-tag checks) and substitutes them verbatim into the input at the offset that flowed into the comparison; value_profile's bucket gradient provides no partial credit for these wide exact-equality literals.
one_line: I2S substitutes sfnt magic and cmap FOURCC so load_virama_glyph returns true

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace copies observed sfnt version word and FOURCC table-tag operands from the CMP buffer into the input, constructing a parseable font that resolves the virama glyph; value_profile's Hamming-distance buckets stall on these multi-byte exact-equality gates.
one_line: I2S plants sfnt version and cmap tag so virama_glyph is non-zero

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace captures the CMP against the cmap codepoint key and substitutes the matching bytes into the input, planting a U+25CC-resolving cmap entry; value_profile stalls at the Hamming-bucket gradient and never lands the exact key.
one_line: I2S injects cmap key for U+25CC so get_nominal_glyph succeeds
